patch.value: Sentry release gate misclassifies handled duplicate-import refusal as a blocking runtime error

The 2026-07-10 scheduled Auto Release reached all build, coverage, and package gates but stopped on PM-CLI-1X. Live Sentry data shows CommandError isUnhandled=false for the intentional merge-strategy fail duplicate guard, which aborts before writes. Extend the expected-handled classifier, prove unhandled variants still block, resolve the Sentry group, and exercise same-day Auto Release recovery.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate check: pm search --status all for Sentry telemetry gate handled import merge-strategy fail release blocker and PM-CLI-1X found no item for this exact 2026-07-10 classifier gap. Canonical precedent pm-yohx is closed historical remediation; this item links the new Sentry group and current release incident without rewriting shipped history.

author: codex-root
message: Start TDD classifier fix and same-day release recovery

value.note: Classify intentional handled duplicate-import refusal without suppressing unhandled variants
TDD regression proves handled duplicate refusal is ignored while unhandled equivalent still blocks

value.author: codex-root
value.text: TDD and release-gate evidence: failing regression first observed high=2 for handled+unhandled duplicate-import twins; implementation adds the narrow merge-strategy fail bead classifier behind the existing CommandError/PmCliError and isUnhandled=false guard. Focused suite passes 49/49. Full repository coverage passes 270 files and 5,506 tests at statements 34380/34380, branches 24588/24588, functions 6882/6882, lines 33039/33039. Typecheck, contract snapshot, ESLint, jscpd 0 clones, static quality/docstrings, token budget, docs/skills, secret scan, and production audit all pass. Live production-token Sentry gate now reports critical=0 high=0, ignored_expected_handled=5 including PM-CLI-1X, and telemetry best-effort reports 0.25% finish errors with zero missing error-code rows. Inline telemetry flush drained the local queue to zero on disk at 2026-07-10T08:48Z.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Operational recovery: GitHub Auto Release run 29073827938 failed only at sentry-telemetry-gate after all build/coverage/package gates passed. Blocker issue: GH #492. The fix preserves the gate for any isUnhandled=true duplicate-import event.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Expected dogfood failures must be classified by stable semantic fragments and only after type plus isUnhandled guards; exact counts or whole messages make release reliability brittle, while a broad text-only ignore could conceal crashes.

patch.value: Implemented and fully verified the narrow expected-handled duplicate-import classifier; unhandled equivalents remain blocking and live Sentry/telemetry gates are green.

author: codex-root

patch.value: Handled duplicate-import dogfood refusals do not count against the release threshold, while unhandled failures with the same text remain blocking.
The narrow guarded classifier ignores PM-CLI-1X and the live gate reports zero blocking high/critical issues; the regression keeps the isUnhandled=true twin in blocking_short_ids.

message: Complete closure result metadata after validation warning
